List O*NET Database Tables

Source: R/database.R
onet_tables.Rd

Retrieves a list of available database tables in O*NET.

Usage

onet_tables()

Value

A tibble with columns:

id

Table identifier

title

Table title/description

Examples

tables <- onet_tables()
head(tables)
#> # A tibble: 6 × 2
#>   id                                 title                             
#>   <chr>                              <chr>                             
#> 1 content_model_reference            Content Model Reference           
#> 2 job_zone_reference                 Job Zone Reference                
#> 3 occupation_data                    Occupation Data                   
#> 4 scales_reference                   Scales Reference                  
#> 5 education_categories               Education Categories              
#> 6 training_and_experience_categories Training and Experience Categories
